issues.description: The receipt does not include the ICP company details as required by the compliance policy. The receipt must show Global People s.r.l. or GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l. details for non-travel expenses.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Invoice must show Global People s.r.l., Via Venti Settembre 3, Torino (TO) CAP 10121, Italy VAT: IT12455930011 C.F: 12455930011 - The Local Employers name and details should appear on invoices, not the workers

issues.description: Additional documentation is required for the mileage claim. The receipt does not provide full details of the vehicle and proof of distance traveled.
issues.recommendation: Please provide a scan of the card passport (libretto di circolazione) and any screenshot from any app that can track start point, arrival point and KM (like google maps) to keep track of the travelled KM
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Scan of the card passport (libretto di circolazione), as it will contain all information regarding the car owner must be provided. Any screenshot from any app that can track start point, arrival point and KM will work (like google maps) to keep track of the travelled KM

issues.description: The flight expense will be grossed up as per the compliance policy. All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free.
issues.recommendation: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free
issues.knowledge_base_reference: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has issues with missing ICP company details, lack of additional documentation for mileage claims, and tax implications requiring gross-up. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with the specified policies.
